title: I want it earlier (Mounts of Mayhem, IWIE)
description: This Minecraft Mod adds things from the Minecraft Live before Mojang publishes them in a snapshot! Or just backport the new stuff..
body:
# I want it earlier

*Don't forget to follow if you want to recieve updates when we do something!*  
**There will not be a release for "Chaos Cubed"!**  

## Functionality

This Minecraft Mod adds blocks, mobs and items before Mojang even publishes them in snapshots! ...or just use the new blocks/items in an old version 🤣.

**The blocks, entities and items from the mod when converting to future versions will ∞% disappear completly.**  
**We recommend you to take frequent backups.**

Requires [FabricMC](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) or [QuiltMC](https://quiltmc.org/en/install/client/)  

### Version

- Latest: [4.5.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/i-want-it-earlier/version/4.5.1)

- 4.x.x: Mounts of Mayhem
- 3.x.x: Happy Ghasts (NOT RELEASED, manual setup, available on [Github](https://github.com/Onako2/i-want-it-earlier/tree/happy-ghast))
- 2.x.x: Pale Garden
- 1.x.x: Tricky Trials


### Features in 4.x.x

We didn't implement everything yet but are working on it!
Stuff we have implemented already:
- Spears
- Nautilus
  - Texture and model
  - Spawn Egg Texture
  - Spawning
  - Mechanics for Pufferfish and saddle (currently there is a small delay while riding)
  - Breeding mechanic
  - Saddle rendering
- Zombie Nautilus
  - Texture and model
  - Spawn Egg texture
- Breath of Nautilus
  - Effect that freezes oxygen bar
- Zombie Horse
  - Spawning

Stuff that is missing:
- Nautilus
  - Animations
- Zombie Nautilus
  - Mechanics around Drowned
  - Spawning
  - Animations

### Contributions

Feel free to contribute assets(also translations) or code on [GitHub](https://github.com/Onako2/i-want-it-earlier)!

#### Contributors
- [Thedzudzu](https://modrinth.com/user/Thedzudzu)
  - Translations(ru_ru/Russian, Tricky Trials, [#1](https://github.com/Onako2/i-want-it-earlier/pull/1))
- [Onako2](https://modrinth.com/user/Onako2)
  - Coding, Translations
- [Mr Knowledge](https://modrinth.com/user/Mr_Knowledge)
  - 100% of Textures and models
- [Bloxcrafter](https://modrinth.com/user/Bloxcrafter)
  - Biomes (Pale Garden)
- [SAGUMEDREAM](https://modrinth.com/user/SAGUMEDREAM)
  - Make Creaking more like vanilla and other [improvements](https://github.com/Onako2/i-want-it-earlier/pull/3) such as adding Simplified Chinese translation
- [HeedlessSoap325](https://github.com/HeedlessSoap325)
  - Translations(de_de/German, Pale Garden, [#7](https://github.com/Onako2/i-want-it-earlier/pull/7))
- [valooost](https://github.com/valooost)
  - Translations(es_es/Spanish, Pale Garden, [#16](https://github.com/Onako2/i-want-it-earlier/pull/16))
- [fen417](https://github.com/fen417)
  - Translations(ru_ru/Russian, Pale Garden, [#17](https://github.com/Onako2/i-want-it-earlier/pull/17))

In case you want to uninstall this mod please install [this data pack](https://github.com/Onako2/i-want-it-earlier/blob/1.22/iwie-uninstall.zip) into all worlds that IWIE was used in because without it you won't be able to open the world :( (Applies to 2.x.x)

**NOT AFFILIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT**
